headline: Nvidia, Boeing Lead 5 Dow Stocks Near Buy Points. They Share This Flaw.
summary: Nvidia and Boeing lead five Dow stocks to watch near buy points this week.  Nvidia stock and its peers have rallied in a soaring stock market, with earnings out of the way for some of these names but not for others.  Walmart, Goldman Sachs and UnitedHealth also make the cut.

headline: Walmart (WMT) – Among the 10 Best Inflation-Hedge Stocks to Buy for 2026
summary: Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) is included among the 10 Best Inflation-Hedge Stocks to Buy for 2026. On May 7, TD Cowen analyst Oliver Chen raised the firm’s price recommendation on Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) to $150 from $145. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. In a research note, the analyst said Walmart looks set for […]
